examples: In industry, diamond can form a tough, non-corrosive coating for tools.
Fluorescent lights use electricity to excite mercury vapor. This produces ultraviolet light that causes a phosphor coating inside the bulb to glow.
We put on the second coating of lacquer.
The outside, with its woody shell and velvety green coating, admittedly offers the more attractive vista.
We also suspect that splash-proof nanotech coating could also be acting as fingerprint magnet.
